clusters.justification: Unifies emotional valence, autonomic arousal, and threat processing into a single macro-functional axis that reliably drives co-activations across the insular, cingulate, and subcortical regions.
Captures the latent neuro-computational domain underlying motivation, reinforcement learning, and cost-benefit decision-making primarily mediated by frontostriatal circuitry.

Encompasses the functionally integrated processes of self-referential thought, interpersonal modeling, and autobiographical memory structurally mapped to the subsystems of the medial prefrontal and parietal cortices.
